description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical container with a transparent teal body and a flat, circular base. The top features a narrow, vertical nozzle or plunger, suggesting it is a type of medical vial or ampoule, possibly for liquid medication or injection. The body appears to be made of plastic or glass, with a metallic or plastic cap at the top. The base is slightly wider than the main cylinder, providing stability when placed upright. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with no visible branding or labeling. The object is compact and portable, suitable for use in healthcare settings or for personal medical use.
description: A tall, transparent teal cylindrical medicine vial or ampoule with a flat base and a narrow nozzle or plunger at the top.
description_view_0: The cylindrical body and flat base are visible, with the nozzle or plunger slightly offset to the left.
description_view_1: The object is seen directly from the side, showing the full width of the base and the central alignment of the nozzle.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the cylinder is visible, with the nozzle or plunger now offset to the right.
description_view_3: A direct side view similar to view 1, with the base and nozzle aligned centrally.
